analysis.reasoning: Core message: Informational tweet listing agenda items for an upcoming European Council meeting (COVID-19, climate change, external relations with Turkey and the U.S., security/terrorism), signaling active coordination among EU leaders. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – Not promoted; no historical reflection or claims of past success. EU2 (EU is united) – Implicitly supported: reference to EU leaders convening with a "busy agenda" suggests coordinated, collective action and solidarity to address shared priorities. EU3 (useful for its citizens) – Weakly implied but not explicit; while topics concern citizens, the tweet does not claim benefits or outcomes, just meeting info. EU4 (avant-garde actor) – Not claimed; no leadership or pioneering language. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – Not addressed. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – Not explicit; mentions external relations but no framing of global betterment. Final determination: EU2.
